description: David prefers email delivery over workspace files
lesson: When creating content for David, send via email and delete workspace files. He explicitly requested: 'I've told you don't save stuff into workspaces. Send me in an email and delete that workspace afterwards.'

description: Stop inbox checks when explicitly told
lesson: When David says 'Stop checking the inbox now', immediately remove the cron job and confirm action taken.
Never state something as fact unless directly verified. From MEMORY.md: 'CERTAINTY RULE: Never state something as fact unless I have directly verified it.'
